response.justification: Bogdan has a strong general software engineering background with experience at major tech companies (Google, Meta) and diverse technical stacks, including Java and JVM tooling. However, his resume lacks explicit focus on enterprise Java/Kotlin IDE tooling, Spring ecosystem, or language internals, which are core to the role. His strongest JVM experience appears to be with C++/C components in IDE environments, not modern enterprise development or IDE subsystems.
strengths: Strong general software engineering experience at top-tier companies (Google, Meta)
Exposure to JVM languages (Java, C/C++ components in IDE environments)
Demonstrated ability to build complex systems and tooling (event-driven platforms, IDE-like environments)
concerns: No explicit experience with enterprise Java/Kotlin IDE tooling or language internals
Limited mention of Spring or other enterprise frameworks in resume
Primary expertise appears to be in web/mobile systems rather than IDE/JVM tooling subsystems
